Canton Fair Competitor Analysis

Focused benchmark of 10 relevant competitor sites (5 list-selling + 5 high-visibility directory/event-data peers).

Reviewed Sites

  • ExhibitorsData
  • VisitorsList
  • BizProspex
  • BuyersContacts
  • ExpoCaptive
  • 10Times
  • EventsEye
  • Events in America
  • B2BTradeShows
  • Exhibitrac

Side-by-side Comparison

SiteProduct LinkObserved Price (Canton Fair list)Notes
ExhibitorsDataOpenNot publicly extractable (anti-bot page)Cloudflare/anti-bot blocked automated fetch
VisitorsListOpenNo clear fixed public price foundPage is content-led; often lead-capture style
BizProspexOpen$2120 (title); also $1320 appears on pageStrong price-forward product page
BuyersContactsOpenCatalog prices shown (e.g. $135, $250, $750, $800, $935)Trade show list catalog; not always Canton-specific line item
ExpoCaptiveOpenNo obvious fixed public priceEducational + lead-gen style

Recommended Page Blueprint

  1. Hero + strong value proposition
  2. Quick stats (records/fields/years/update date)
  3. Sample table preview
  4. Packages by year with clear pricing
  5. FAQ and objections handling
  6. Final CTA and support contact
